agents.name: Internal Science Lead
agents.why: owns the moat hypothesis (the #N starting ranks)

agents.name: Q-Models Runner
agents.why: quantify binding / selectivity / ADMET on the surfaced candidate

agents.name: FDA Institutional Memory ⛔
agents.why: dispositive-veto check on the class (prior CRL/withdrawal)

panel.persona: Dr. Henrik Sorensen, H. Lundbeck A/S
Dr. Sam Ostrowski, RA Capital Management

panel.why: institutional — must stay adversarial; stress every claim

facts.value: SCN11A/Nav1.9 — TTX-resistant VGSC in peripheral nociceptors; small-molecule inhibitor in scope.
Moat ranked Nav1.9 #7 — ultra-slow persistent current under-resolved by the optical-EP assay.
Boltz-2 pKd 7.2, prob_binder 0.88; Nav1.5 cross-pKd 6.9 (~2x vs >100x needed).
SCN11A SAFE class — LoF tolerable, no clinical tox; cleanest profile in the panel.
CACNA2D1 CRITICAL (black-box respiratory depression); NGF CRITICAL (RPOA, NDA rejected 2021, PMID 37652258) — removed from ranking.
CardioGenAI: moderate hERG, elevated Nav1.5 risk.
No clinical-stage Nav1.9 inhibitor exists — SAFE is provisional; >100x Nav1.5 selectivity unproven.

synthesis.recommendation: Advance SCN11A / Nav1.9 to a focused cardiac-selectivity de-risking experiment — not yet to a full program. Structure any external deal as option / milestone-heavy.
synthesis.consensus: Unanimous: the #7→#1 promotion is scientifically sound — human Mendelian genetics + the panel's only SAFE class make Nav1.9 genuine first-in-class non-opioid pain whitespace.
synthesis.dissent: Low divergence. Conviction 3 (Xenon, Lundbeck, Takeda) vs 4 (RA Capital — weights the asymmetric first-in-class upside higher). No champion, no veto — all four 'conditional'.
synthesis.convergent_gate: All four independently flagged the SAME risk: cardiac Nav1.5 selectivity (~2× measured vs >100× needed).
synthesis.proposed_experiment: Resolve Nav1.9's persistent current in Quiver's oEP assay (the signal the moat under-detected) AND demonstrate >100× functional Nav1.5 sparing for a lead chemotype — closing the active-learning loop on the moat's own blind spot.
synthesis.confidence: Biology: HIGH. Overall program: CONDITIONAL on the selectivity gate.
open_items: No clinical-stage Nav1.9 inhibitor exists — SAFE is provisional; >100x Nav1.5 selectivity unproven.
